title: Determination of Phenolic Compounds
author: Jorge Carlos Ruiz Ruiz
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.sfkebkw
materials: Distilled water was added to a final volume of 2.5 mL. Following incubation for 3 min at 37 °C in a water bath, the absorbance was measured at 750 nm. Gallic acid (Sigma-Aldrich) was used as the standard and the results were expressed as µg/mL of gallic acid equivalents (GAE).

steps.title: An aliquot of sample (0
steps.instruction: An aliquot of sample (0.25 mL) was mixed with 0.15 mL of the Folin-Ciocalteu reagent and 1 mL of a 15% sodium carbonate solution.
